## 🚀 About Me

- ⚡ I take products from **zero to production** — database schema → API → pixel-perfect UI → AI intelligence layer
- 🏗️ Built **STROT**, **VAIDYA.ai** & **Annapurna** — platforms for social impact, healthcare, and food rescue
- 🏆 Hackathon builder — projects built and shipped at **HackVortex Lifeline** & **Byte Battle**
- 🧠 Obsessed with **AI-powered products**: Gemini pipelines, OCR workflows, autonomous agents
- 🌱 Currently deep-diving **AI agents, Web3 & scalable system design**
- 🎓 BCA @ Dr. Virendra Swarup Institute of Computer Studies (2023–2026) — Kanpur, India 🇮🇳

<br/>

## ⚔️ Featured Builds

| Project | What it does | Stack |
|---------|--------------|-------|
| **[STROT](https://strot-in.vercel.app)** 🌏 · [repo](https://github.com/Pranjulrathour/strot.in) | Social-impact platform moving communities from aid to employment | TypeScript · Supabase · PostgreSQL |
| **[VAIDYA.ai](https://vaidya-ai-seven.vercel.app)** 🩺 · [repo](https://github.com/Pranjulrathour/VAIDYA.ai) | AI copilot that turns medical reports into scores, risks & next steps | React · Gemini · Supabase |
| **[Annapurna](https://annapurna-live.vercel.app)** 🍛 · [repo](https://github.com/Pranjulrathour/annapurna.live) | Real-time food rescue routing surplus meals to NGOs & volunteers | TypeScript · React · Supabase |
| **[SOLVM8](https://github.com/Pranjulrathour/SOLVM8)** 📚 | AI tutor — OCR any assignment, get step-by-step PDF solutions | Gemini · Tesseract · Postgres |
| **[Portfolio](https://pranjulrathour.vercel.app)** ✨ · [repo](https://github.com/Pranjulrathour/-portfolio) | 3D-animated portfolio with a Supabase-backed admin CMS | Three.js · React · Supabase |
